Compute Shaders

by

Compute Shaders

Author: Arnas

Initial Understanding

While I have heard about compute shaders before, this would be my first time implementing them into an application. Thanks to that, I can make some assumptions on how to implement it, but using Microsoft’s documentation, I can get exact details on the overall idea of compute shaders 1, and how to create them in my application 2.

Implementation

Referances

1: stevewhims (n.d.). Compute Shader Overview - Win32 apps. [online] learn.microsoft.com. Available at: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/direct3d11/direct3d-11-advanced-stages-compute-shader.

2: stevewhims (2021). How To Create a Compute Shader - Win32 apps. [online] Microsoft.com. Available at: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/direct3d11/direct3d-11-advanced-stages-compute-create.
